Title: Detect broken link on SEO slug miss
Steps:
1. Create a product with SEO slug
2. Delete or change the slug
3. Visit old URL
Expected Result: Broken page detected; entry created in Broken Pages list

Title: Broken Page widget in dashboard
Steps:
1. Navigate to Admin Dashboard
2. Locate Broken Page widget
Expected Result: Widget displays count of broken pages

Title: Widget opens scoped Broken Page grid
Steps: 1. Click on Broken Page widget
Expected Result: Grid opens showing all broken pages with columns: URL, status, redirect, hits

Title: Broken page status - Active
Steps:
1. Navigate to Broken Pages grid
2. Filter by Active status
Expected Result: Active broken pages displayed

Title: Broken page status - Resolved
Steps:
1. Open active broken page
2. Enter redirect URL
3. Mark as Resolved
Expected Result: Status transitions to Resolved; redirect URL saved

Title: Broken page status - Accepted
Steps:
1. Open active broken page
2. Accept without redirect
Expected Result: Status transitions to Accepted

Title: Display correct columns in broken page row
Steps:
1. Navigate to Broken Pages grid
2. Verify column data
Expected Result: Each row shows URL, status, redirect URL, hit count, description

Title: Open row for redirect edit
Steps: 1. Click on broken page row
Expected Result: Redirect edit blade opens with URL and status fields

Title: Save redirect URL and resolve
Steps:
1. Open broken page row
2. Enter redirect URL
3. Save and set status to Resolved
Expected Result: Redirect URL saved; status changed to Resolved

Title: Display target description
Steps: 1. Open resolved broken page
Expected Result: Target description displayed for redirect URL

Title: Update redirect after resolution
Steps:
1. Open resolved broken page
2. Change redirect URL
3. Save
Expected Result: Redirect URL updated successfully

Title: Reject empty or invalid redirect
Steps:
1. Leave redirect URL empty
2. Attempt to resolve
3. Enter invalid URL format
4. Attempt to resolve
Expected Result: Validation error; empty/invalid redirect rejected

Title: Frontend redirect for broken page
Preconditions: Broken page resolved with redirect URL
Steps: 1. Visit broken page URL on frontend
Expected Result: User redirected to configured redirect URL

Title: Frontend 404 for unresolved broken page
Steps: 1. Visit broken page URL on frontend
Expected Result: 404 page displayed

Title: Column sorting functionality
Steps:
1. Click column headers to sort
2. Verify sort order
Expected Result: Columns sort correctly (ascending/descending)

Title: Search functionality in broken pages
Steps:
1. Enter search term in search field
2. Verify filtered results
Expected Result: Broken pages filtered by search term

Title: Status filtering and management
Steps:
1. Filter by Active status
2. Filter by Resolved status
3. Filter by Accepted status
Expected Result: Status filter works correctly for each status type

Title: Bulk operations management
Steps:
1. Select multiple broken pages
2. Perform bulk resolve/accept/delete
Expected Result: Bulk operations applied to all selected items

Title: Complete redirect workflow validation
Steps:
1. Create product with SEO slug
2. Change slug to break old URL
3. Detect broken page in admin
4. Set redirect URL and resolve
5. Visit old URL on frontend
Expected Result: End-to-end redirect workflow: detection > resolution > frontend redirect

Title: Hit count tracking validation
Steps:
1. Visit broken URL multiple times
2. Check hit count in admin
Expected Result: Hit count increments with each visit
